flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Davidson-Davie Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Davidson-Davie Community College rose 48% between 2006 and 2009 (28.1% → 41.5%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Davidson-Davie Community College are 9% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($36.3k vs $33.4k).
